titleStmt.title: SII 34.307: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 307. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On a the west wall of the Chaṇḍēśvara shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: It says that Vaḻittuṇai-perumāḷ alias Vilāḍarāyar provided for torches to be lit during the festival days for the merit of his overlord (sāmantaṉār). He did the arrangement with the concurrence of the temple trustees, the ūrār, the nagarattār and other kuḍimakkaḷ of Tiruvaraṅguḷam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrī
vīrapāṇṭiyatēvaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 7 vatu cāmaṉtaṉār ti
rumēṉikku naṉṟāka Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiya
nāyaṉāṟkku vaḻittuṇaipperumāḷāṉa vilāṭarāya
ṉ kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu
Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkku tirunāḷuk
ku vācal pantammu nilaipantam Ēttiṉa tām vācalilē tiṅkaḷ
ḷeṇṇai vārttu nālu tiruṉāḷum piṭikka kaṭavarāka Ippaṭikku ka
llilum cempilum veṭṭi kuṭuttōm Uṭaiyār ti
ruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkku tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiyanāya
ṉār kōyil tāṉattārum Ūrōmum nakarattōmum Iv
vūṟp pala kuṭimakkaḷum Ippaṭikku poṉmāḷikaippiḷḷai Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaippiḷḷai Eḻuttu Irārāpaṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu poṉmēñcamārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Iruvattiruvamārā
yaṉ Eḻuttu Irācarācaṉ piramārāyaṉ Eḻuttu cētirāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Āṉai niṉṟa vaiyirākirattu nāṟpatteṇṇāyirampiḷḷai Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku nelvāyil Uṭaiyā muttu Irāmāṇṭār
Eḻuttu kōyil kaṇakku ti Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 34.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
